feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S4 Hana Content Federation to SAP Build Workzone | Internal server error
entry.content:
Hi,

I am federating content from S4 Hana 2022 to SAP Build Workzone Standard edition.
I'm able to see the tiles on my site, but when I click on a tile I get blank screen with "Internal Server Error".

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: [URGENT] All My Inbox apps in SAP BTP Build Work Zone are Crashing in 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

All your Build workzone My Inbox apps are crashing in Build workzone, please help.

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition & SAP Mobile Start app: selection of language?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we have a SAP Build Work Zone standard edition page, and when the page is opened on a desktop browser the user can switch between available page languages in their setting:

However when opening the same page in SAP Mobile Start app this setting for language and region seem not to be available. Am I missing something, is it not possible to switch between languages also on a mobile device?

Thank you, Br petra

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone (standard) and visibility using {ui>/editable} and {= !${ui>/editable}}
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In our Fiori List report app, I would like to hide and show some of the Object Page fields and sections depending on whether the page is in Creation or Display mode. I have used Fiori Tools Page editor:

 

which resulted in JSON like so:

 

 

 

 "sections": {
        "A": {
            "form": {
                "fields": {
                    "ShortText": {
                        "visible": "{ui>/editable}"
                    },
                    "Desendtmstp": {
                        "visible": "{= !${ui>/editable}}"
                    },
                    "CreatedOn": {
                        "visible": "{= !${ui>/editable}}"
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "D": {
            "visible": "{ui>/editable}"
        },

 

 

 

This works as intended in SAP BAS preview and from BTP subaccount HTML5 Apps. But from SAP Build Work Zone (standard edition) site and on the mobile devices everything is visible in both Create and Display mode.

What could be the problem and how can I fix it?

Thanks, BR Petra

entry.title: Buil Workzone Trail POC
entry.content:
Hello Team,

i am leveraging the BTP trail account to get hands on SAP  Build WorkZone.

i trail BTP account ,i created a sub account and subscribed to "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition"

when i try to access the application,it is navigating me to "Site Manager - Site Directory",i am expecting  landing page should take me to Admin Console.

could you please suggest,what is missing here to navigate to admin console

entry.title: Dynamically assign Fiori tiles to end users?
entry.content:
Hi folks,

In the old portal-based ESS solutions it was possibly to dynamically control the visibility of various self-service applications from the backend ERP system..

This could be done both with the older Java based ESS via a proxy class, and the newer Web Dynpro ABAP ESS via a standard BAdI implementation.

Just wondering if anybody has found a way to do that with S/4HANA using the Fiori launchpad or Work Zone, without having to rely on PFCG roles?

entry.title: Issue with Using MAX Formula in SAP Build Apps - Only First Row Accessible
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue when trying to use the MAX formula in SAP Build Apps. I want to get the maximum value from a specific column in my data variable. However, when I try to select a column, I can only choose it from the first row (e.g., data.App1[0].Qty) instead of selecting the entire column (e.g., data.App1[].Qty).

Expected behavior:

  • The MAX function should be able to evaluate the entire list of numeric values in a column.

Observed behavior:

  • The formula editor only allows selecting a column from the first row (data.App1[0].Qty), which does not provide the expected result for the whole dataset.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a workaround or a correct way to reference an entire column in SAP Build Apps formulas?

entry.title: Build work Zone standard edition, Theme manager and site load issues
entry.content:
Hi Team, I am new to SAP Build Work zone, please help me to resolve below issues

1. I am unable to launch Theme designer from Theme manager, but i have "Launchpad_Advanced_Theming" role assigned to my User which i verified again, Can someone help me understand why I am getting this error

2. If i Change the View mode to "Groups" in site settings then i am unable to view the applications, if i change it to "Spaces and Pages - New Experience" then i am getting the same, I have assigned all the spaces and applications to new role and assigned that specific role to my User ID

entry.title: Cannot see Cards type for ContentPackage on Build Workzone Standard edition
entry.content:
Hi, im following this tutorial Integrate Your UI Integration Card from the Content Package Into Your Site.

at the final step, i suppose to see My Cards in Home tab of build workzone. but i have signout signin many time still cannot see the My Cards widget.
i have check the version of the package to version 1.0.2 in manifest.json file, assign role to user in BTP cockpit... but still not able to see. 
can anyone help me if i missing any additional step ?

 

cannot see my cards widget:

entry.title: how to connect a SAP Ariba Network Business portal to SAP Build work Zone
entry.content: I have the SAP Build Work Zone and I like to add the SAP Ariba Network (with option for authentication with userid and password).  I tried adding it as a URL app, but it does not giving option to sign in and gives a blank screen when clicking the tile.

entry.title: [BTP Workzone] Metadata not found 404
entry.content:
Hello,

i am facing an issue where i have created a full stack app using CAP framework using this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.hana-cloud-cap.html , tested everything working fine in BAS and also continuing to that i managed to deploy it CF following this https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-deploy-mta.html , everything is working as excepted & i am able to test the app using app router with necessary authentication also.

But when i try to use the app in workzone, i just did "cds add workzone" where its added the html5 repo,destinations,,, features. I am able to integrate/add the app into workzone site and when i try to launch the app from workzone tile its not launching the app or its giving 404 error while loading the metadata.

Any help would be highly appreciated. 

Thanks

entry.title: Change Display of Quantity Fields in specific language SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change the display of quantity fields in SAP Build Workzone for a specific language. For example, when you want to display a value of PC they will be displayed with decimal places like "1,000 PC" for one PC is available in Stock. In English language it will displayed "1 PC" without any decimal places. We also want the same display in every language.

Best regards,

Nico

entry.title: Content Federation from S/4 HANA to SAP BTP Build Workzone opens on premise FLP in new tab
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we have setup BTP build workzone with content federation from on-premise S/4HANA system (with Exposure Version V2). When the user click on a (exposed) tile in the workzone, a new tab is opened and the app is shown in the on-premise FLP. PWhen the user clicks on back or home button the users stays in the FLP on-premise and is not navigating back to the workzone. Now users can open the apps that are on the on-premise FLP, but the users should start the apps from the workzone. In note 3345119 

So how to avoid the user to navigate in the FLP on-premise and go bac to the Wrokzone?

If this is how it should work what is the benefit of exposing content to the workzone? In that case a link to the on-premise FLP would then be sufficient or do we miss some configuration?

Thanks in advance

Lee

entry.title: Variant management and personalization service for app deployed on BTP
entry.content:
I deployed a freestyle app to BTP and also created a SAP Build Workzone site and I can access the app via a tile there. I want to be able to use variant management for this app but the requests keep giving me a 404 error

Is there something else that I need to add?

entry.title: SAP Process Automation tasks not visible in the Build Work Zone Inbox for process participant users
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a process that is triggered with a 5 minute timer (which I trigger it by clicking the run now) from Trigger Tab in the Environment from Control Tower in Build Lobby.  Process run and executes the approval form.  I give a list of email ID (for which we have created the users in BTP and the Custom IDP as well) and I see the tasks as a developer in my inbox but for others (who are given the process participant role), the same tasks are not visible.  I gave the email list as comma seperated in the receipient list in the approval form and still they are not able to access the task.  I created the user group and added all the user's in the custom IDP that I have using the administrator access and used that group in the group section for the approval form and still the inbox is not showing the tasks.  I am the sub account administrator and other who want to the see the tasks are process participants.  I am not sure what is missing that make the inbox not to show the tasks for others even though they are added to the group in the custom IDP.

entry.title: Fiori Elements Apps deployed from Business Application Studio not showing in HTML5 APPLICATIONS BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following a tutorial: Welcome to the Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps openSAP samples 

available at https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-opensap/tree/main

I am stuck in week 3 unit 4.

Hands-on exercise for week 3 unit 4: Deploying your SAP Fiori elements app 

So far, I have followed everything as described in the tutorial. When deployed from Business Application Studio, the app does not appear in HTML5 Applications in BTP Cockpit and content Manager work zone.

I tried https://me.sap.com/notes/0003228331 but this didn't work.

While searching for solution I came across this https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/after-deploying-to-cloud-foundry-log-shows-successful-but-html5-url-not/qaq-p/12394072#M4638454 - but this also didn't work.

Please help in this regard.

@jlong 

@SAPCommunity 

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Work Zone launchpad tile points to wrong URL
entry.content:
I created and deployed a UI5 app, and then created a site using the Work Zone standard edition. I added a tile for my app but it loads indefinitely and the console shows an error saying the component.js file couldn't be loaded from the app's address. I verified the ui5AppInfo.json file and found that the cached url doesn't enclude the Business Solution, and only shows the app's ID. When I add the missing part with the debugger the app works fine.

How can I get the ui5AppInfo.json file to get the correct URL?

entry.title: How to remove the header that automatically added to application while deploying to build work zone.
entry.content:
I deployed an application using mbt build and cf deploy, created a site in build work zone, standard edition.
A header is automatically being added to my application as shown in the picture attached. Is there a way to remove that?

entry.title: UI5 apps added to SAP Build Workzone not working
entry.content:
I have created a Freestyle UI5 application and deployed it to BTP with Managed approuter. Added the UI5 application to a site in SAP Build Workzone. When I try to open the application by pressing the tile, it keeps on loading, and ended up with error in console.
Error:
The issue is most likely caused by application Please create a support incident and assign it to the support component of the respective application 

manifest.json

{
  "_version": "1.60.0",
  "sap.app": {
    "id": "com.alcon.ftarequestssupplier",
    "type": "application",
    "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
    "applicationVersion": {
      "version": "0.0.1"
    },
    "title": "{{appTitle}}",
    "description": "{{appDescription}}",
    "resources": "resources.json",
    "sourceTemplate": {
      "id": "@sap/generator-fiori:basic",
      "version": "1.16.5",
      "toolsId": "e0547311-82f0-46e3-9d66-9d981d487667"
    },
    "dataSources": {
      "Z8CZV_SB_FTA_HD_VAN": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='Z8CZV_SB_FTA_HD_VAN',Version='0001')/$value/",
        "type": "ODataAnnotation",
        "settings": {
          "localUri": "localService/mainService/Z8CZV_SB_FTA_HD_VAN.xml"
        }
      },
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z8CZV_SB_FTA_HD/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [
            "Z8CZV_SB_FTA_HD_VAN"
          ],
          "localUri": "localService/mainService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      },
      "valueHelpService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z8CZV_SB_PREF_CODES/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      },
      "actionService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z8CZGW_VP_ACTIONS_SRV/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }
    },
    "crossNavigation": {
      "inbounds": {
        "ftarequests-manage": {
          "semanticObject": "ftarequests",
          "action": "manage",
          "title": "{{ftarequests-manage.flpTitle}}",
          "signature": {
            "parameters": {},
            "additionalParameters": "allowed"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.ui": {
    "technology": "UI5",
    "fullWidth": true,
    "icons": {
      "icon": "",
      "favIcon": "",
      "phone": "",
      "phone@2": "",
      "tablet": "",
      "tablet@2": ""
    },
    "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
  },
  "sap.ui5": {
    "flexEnabled": true,
    "dependencies": {
      "minUI5Version": "1.120.14",
      "libs": {
        "sap.m": {},
        "sap.ui.core": {}
      }
    },
    "contentDensities": {
      "compact": true,
      "cozy": true
    },
    "models": {
      "i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "settings": {
          "bundleName": "com.alcon.ftarequestssupplier.i18n.i18n"
        }
      },
      "": {
        "dataSource": "mainService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {}
      },
      "action":{
        "dataSource": "actionService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {}
      },
      "valueHelp":{
        "dataSource": "valueHelpService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {}
      }
    },
    "resources": {
      "css": [
        {
          "uri": "css/style.css"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routing": {
      "config": {
        "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
        "controlAggregation": "pages",
        "controlId": "app",
        "transition": "slide",
        "type": "View",
        "viewType": "XML",
        "path": "com.alcon.ftarequestssupplier.view",
        "async": true,
        "viewPath": "com.alcon.ftarequestssupplier.view"
      },
      "routes": [
        {
          "name": "RouteWorklist",
          "pattern": ":?query:",
          "target": [
            "TargetWorklist"
          ]
        },
        {
          "pattern": "Products(guid'{sdreqhd_uuid}',{smtp_addr})",
          "name": "detail",
          "target": "detail"
        }
      ],
      "targets": {
        "TargetWorklist": {
          "id": "Worklist",
          "name": "Worklist"
        },
        "detail": {
          "viewId": "detail",
          "viewName": "Detail"
        }
      }
    },
    "rootView": {
      "viewName": "com.alcon.ftarequestssupplier.view.App",
      "type": "XML",
      "id": "App"
    }
  }
}

Error

entry.title: Is it possible to adopt the language setting from WorkZone in an App built using SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I have an app built using SAP Build Apps which is published to SAP Build Work Zone. Is there a way to set the language of the app to the langauge setting in SAP Build Work Zone? 

I tried to process the standard URL parameter set by SAP Build Work Zone, sap-locale, to set systemVars.i18n.currentLanguage. But the app does not appear to be receiving this parameter in systemVars.initialUrl eventhough it is set by SAP Build Work Zone. If I set this parameter in preview, the app is receiving the parameter.
